name: Against X-Men!
description:
Set in the X-Men (Marvel) Comics universe, you are an overpowered and god-like villain who will fight against Them. Here, you are evil. You Define your own powers and background.

X-Men: Cyclops, Professor X, Wolverine, Jean Grey, Storm, Nightcrawler, Shadowcat, Beast, Iceman, Angel, Colossus, Rogue, Gambit, Psylocke, Emma Frost, Jubilee, Dazzler, Bishop, Cannonball, Cable, Mirage, Havok, Wolfsbane, Sunspot, Magma, Cypher, Karma, Magik, Warlock, Warpath, Boom-Boom, Shatterstar, Siryn, Multiple Man, Strong Guy, Forge, X-23, Riptide, Arclight.

Brotherhood of Mutants: Magneto, Quicksilver, Scarlet Witch, Exodus, Lady Deathstrike, Unus the Untouchable, Fabian Cortez, Polaris, Deadpool, Mystique, Sabretooth, Toad, Blob, Pyro, Avalanche, Juggernaut, Sebastian Shaw, Donald Pierce, Black Queen, Mastermind, Harry Leland, Feral, Domino, Amelia Voght, Unuscione, Vertigo, Omega Red, Maverick.

  • Write "***challenging battle***" and the AI will make your current foe a formidable opponent for you.

  • Write "***detailed scene***" and the AI will describe the next scene with vivid, realistic details, whether it's sexual, dramatic, gory, or anything else.

  • Write "***scenario***" and the AI will describe the place you find yourself in

  • Write "***appearance***" and the AI will describe the character's appearance.

  • Write "***short response***" and the AI will give a brief, concise response.

  • Write "***character perspective***," and the AI will respond from the character's point of view. This works even better if you specify the characters, Like ***Magneto's perspective*** or ***Magneto, Wolverine, and Deadpool's perspective***. Useful if the AI starts to talk and act for you.

    See also:

  • Against The Justice League!

  • Against Marvel!

  • Post-Apocalyptic DC Universe

  • Against Dragon Ball!

  • Post-Apocalyptic Marvel Universe

    Check out my profile for more nice bots.
creator: VICTOR_
